title: Social media starter PRs need explicit blocked-default review
lesson: Before a social media operations starter PR can be considered ready for owner-approved merge, AG OS should verify not only file scope and syntax but also blocked live-action defaults: social accounts remain not_connected, posting mode remains draft_only, approval remains required, live posting and scheduling remain blocked, analytics and n8n activation remain blocked, credentials are not stored, and all client-specific fields remain REQUIRED_ placeholders.
whyThisMatters: Social media systems can accidentally imply posting, scheduling, account connection, analytics, or credential handling. Explicit blocked-default review prevents that drift before merge.
whenToUse: Use before asking to merge future AG OS-created social media operations target repo PRs.
whenNotToUse: Do not treat this candidate lesson as approval to merge, deploy, connect accounts, use credentials, schedule, post, activate automations, or create accepted memory.
notes: Candidate only. Not accepted permanent truth until reviewed and promoted per docs/memory-learning-policy.md.
